content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates strong, timely reads throughout. Turn 6 names the deflection in real time ('I notice you just answered a different question'), catching the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body pattern at the moment it occurs. Turn 8 reads the linguistic caveat ('not necessarily informative ones') and names its function — a classic AoA read of the qualifier-as-distance-keeper, akin to the happiness filter / composure-as-control read. Turn 12 invites a somatic check at exactly the moment the client's composure is cracking, which surfaces the jaw tightness the client hadn't noticed. Reads precede questions consistently: the coach names what they're noticing, then inquires into it. The one gap is that the coach didn't explicitly name the broader pattern (the intellectual frame itself, or the happiness-filter composure) by function — but the operative reads of the caveat and the deflection effectively did this work and changed the conversation.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Content-level orienting question, no read yet."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Refuses the epistemological frame and pivots to fear — good move but not yet a named read."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection explicitly ('I notice you just answered a different question'). Distinguishes said from shown. Timely read at the exact moment it matters."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the linguistic caveat ('not necessarily informative ones') and names its function — a specific AoA read of the qualifier/distancing move."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the read by inviting the client to drop the qualifier — read-grounded question."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots to somatic read at the moment the composure cracks; lands the jaw tightness."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays on the somatic signature rather than moving past it — pause on the read."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter"],
  "notes": "The happiness-filter / composure read is functionally addressed via the caveat read in turn 8, but never named at the pattern level (the smile-as-distance, the measured voice). A 3 still fits because the operative reads were specific, timely, and changed the conversation."
}
